_comment: ContextOS MCP server — stdio transport (Module 02 S5 walking skeleton). Only the 'ping' tool is live in this slice; the full eight contextos__* tools land in S6–S15. The HTTP (Streamable HTTP) transport is deferred to S16 and will be added as a second entry under mcpServers when ready. CONTEXTOS_LOG_DESTINATION=stderr is load-bearing — the stdio transport reserves stdout for JSON-RPC frames and a single stray log byte on stdout corrupts the protocol.
